data.name: Hentai Age Idol
data.detailed_description:
Dive into a charming and tranquil puzzle journey where each level you finish unveils breathtaking, alluring images of beautiful girls. Soft background music enhances the calm atmosphere as you skillfully move and place tiles to reveal the complete picture. With puzzles that gradually increase in challenge, your concentration and strategy will be put to the test.

Enjoy complete freedom with no time pressure, allowing you to solve puzzles at a pace that feels right for you. Whether you’re a casual gamer or a true puzzle lover, this experience delivers both visual appeal and lasting satisfaction.

Features:

Unlock captivating and attractive girl images with every puzzle cleared.

Enjoy soothing background music that enriches the relaxing vibe.

View the full completed image after each stage.

Play through endless puzzles with steadily rising difficulty.

No countdowns—immerse yourself in a stress-free puzzle adventure.

data.short_description: Relax with a soothing puzzle adventure where each stage reveals captivating images of beautiful girls. Enjoy calm music, increasing challenges, and freedom to play at your own pace without time limits
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 捷克文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
